name: Comment Templates
description: Adds a comment template button on the comment menu for levels.

use_old_ui.name: Use Old UI
use_old_ui.description: If enabled, uses the old UI.

use_curly_braces.name: Use Curly Braces
use_curly_braces.description:
If enabled, variable names will be put in curly braces.
For example: <cg>AttemptCount</c> becomes <cb>{</c><cg>AttemptCount</c><cb>}</c>.
This can improve the readability of the templates in the settings.

use_quick_insert.name: Quick Template Insert
use_quick_insert.description: Skips template selection and just inserts the correct template. Also disables the button on levels that aren't daily, weekly, or demon.

supress_warnings.name: Supress Warning Popups
supress_warnings.description: Prevents the warning popups from appearing.
